result:
The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been successfully completed. The cleaned dataset containing standardized employment status variables for mothers and fathers at ages 14-17 has been saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The file includes:

1. Standardized missing value codes (-3 for not asked, -8 for don't know, -9 for refusal, etc.)
2. Consistent variable naming conventions (ecoactmumXX, ecoactdadXX)
3. All four waves of data merged by NSID
4. Original employment status codes preserved with standardized missing value handling

The dataset is now ready for analysis with proper longitudinal structure and consistent coding across all waves.
